title: Phase 0 Foundation: Scaffold literary_ai package under /bookforge
job:
Phase 0 Foundation: Scaffold literary_ai package under /bookforge
1. Create /bookforge/literary_ai/ directory structure
2. Generate pyproject.toml with pip install -e . support
3. Implement ollama_client.py with timeout handling
4. Create artifact schema files for all required types
5. Set up SQLite store stub with basic CRUD
6. Build Typer CLI skeleton with init/status commands
7. Write README.md explaining project structure and usage
8. Ensure all files are within /bookforge directory
9. Verify gates: pip install -e ., pytest, cli commands
10. Commit to job/bookforge-phase0 branch and open PR to main
